g.text: 0x01 | 2 B | uint16_t | first_freeblock | offset of first freeblock, 0=none
0x03 | 2 B | uint16_t | cell_count | number of cells on this page
0x05 | 2 B | uint16_t | cell_content_area | byte offset where content area starts (stored 0 means 65536)
0x07 | 1 B | uint8_t | fragmented_bytes | count of fragmented free bytes in content area
0x08 | 4 B | uint32_t | right_child | rightmost child page number (internal pages only)
Total 12 bytes at page start | Page 1 only: DB header occupies bytes 0-99, PageHeader at offset 0x64
0x0D | TABLE_LEAF | stores full rows + rowids | leaf of table B+tree
0x05 | TABLE_INTERNAL | rowid routing only | interior of table B+tree
0x0A | INDEX_LEAF | stores (key, rowid) pairs | leaf of index B+tree
0x02 | INDEX_INTERNAL | key routing only | interior of index B+tree
Page 1 special: SQLite DB header at bytes 0x000-0x063; PageHeader at 0x064
Varint encoding: 1-9 bytes, MSB=continuation bit, 7 data bits per byte
CELL POINTER ARRAY [0x00C – 0x00C + cell_count x 2] grows forward
FREE SPACE (cell_content_area minus 12 plus cell_count x 2 bytes available)
varint | payload_size | total payload byte count
varint | rowid | integer primary key (1-9 bytes)
4 bytes | overflow_pgno| only if payload exceeds max inline size
B+tree leaf sorted by rowid ASC; no right_child cell field
4 bytes | left_child | page number of left child subtree (big-endian uint32)
varint | separator | rowid: all rows in left subtree have rowid <= separator
right_child | stored in PageHeader.right_child | page no. of rightmost child
N cells produce N+1 children; keys in left child <= separator key
Internal pages contain no payload data in TABLE trees
varint | payload_size | total payload byte count
4 bytes | overflow_pgno| only if payload exceeds max inline size
Sorted by (key_val ASC, rowid ASC) for duplicate key handling
right_child in PageHeader = right sibling for leaf-chain range scans
4 bytes | left_child | page number of left child (big-endian uint32)
varint | payload_size | byte count of separator key payload
N bytes | payload | 1-col record: separator key value only
4 bytes | overflow_pgno| only if separator key payload exceeds max inline
right_child | in PageHeader.right_child | rightmost child page
True B+tree: all data rows live in INDEX_LEAF pages only
0x00C | uint16_t | ptr[0] -> byte offset of cell[0] content
0x00E | uint16_t | ptr[1] -> byte offset of cell[1] content
0x00C+2i | uint16_t | ptr[i] -> byte offset of cell[i] content
Pointers maintained in key order: ptr[0]=smallest key ptr[N-1]=largest key
Each new cell appends 2 bytes here AND decrements cell_content_area
Defragment when free is sufficient but fragmented
0xFF8 | cell[N-1] | last inserted cell, nearest page end
cell_content_area | cell[0] | current low-water mark for content
On insert: cell_content_area -= cell_len then write cell bytes there
Deleted cell space becomes freeblock linked list via first_freeblock
pointer array starts immediately after header
pointer array grows forward into free space
content area grows backward into free space
